subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Lo, the world hath been illumined with the lights of knowledge when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم قد تنور العالم بانوار العرفان اذ
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
